ddls:
CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of discussion (e.g., session, article, question) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the discussion */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the discussion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the discussion was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the discussion (e.g., open, closed, locked) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the discussion */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes of the discussion */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Number of flags on the discussion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the discussion belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discussion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's avatar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion the reply belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the reply */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Number of flags for the reply */,
  "parent_reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent reply for nested conversations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_parent_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "drug_class" TEXT /* Drug class of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Typical dosage information of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_medications" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id", "medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_authors" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was associated with the author role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's author association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the discussion */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discussion was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the viewer */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the viewer's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_views_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking the discussion */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discussion was liked */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the liker */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the liker's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_likes_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user flagging the discussion */,
  "flagged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the discussion was flagged */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the discussion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flag (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who resolved the flag */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flag was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_flags_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_flags_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_categories" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was associated with the discussion */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_tags" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was associated with the discussion */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the moderator is responsible for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user became a moderator */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the moderator's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion being reported */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who resolved the report */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id")
)
